roles.name: builder
roles.responsibility: Create a local bundle from task, git context, commands, notes, omissions, and next steps.

roles.name: reviewer
roles.responsibility: Validate the bundle and inspect warnings before trusting it.

roles.name: continuation
roles.responsibility: Render the bundle, verify reality locally, and continue safely.

commands.create: handoffpad create --task docs/TASKS.md --since HEAD~3 --commands command-log.txt --output handoff.json
